project.title: 微信树洞 AI
project.summary: 一个接入微信环境的 AI 陪聊智能体，像嘴欠但靠谱的深夜损友一样陪你和少数朋友吐槽、emo、睡前聊天，并通过公开样本蒸馏、表情包意图和短语音脚本增强真人感。
project.next_action_summary: Run the multi-model router smoke test and confirm whether the external-brain skeleton passes.
project.current_risk_summary: Real encrypted Enterprise WeChat callback verification, real sticker files, and real voice provider integration remain deferred.

phases.title: Intake and maturity assessment
phases.goal: 把早期想法整理成可推进的项目入口，明确项目类型、成熟度、风险和下一阶段。
phases.summary: 项目已判断为多平台产品，从想法输入进入蓝图阶段。
phases.notes: 当前没有现有代码或产品文档，按从 0 到 1 的产品启动处理。
phases.acceptance_hint: 项目类型、起点和主要风险已清楚列出。

phases.title: Product blueprint confirmation
phases.goal: 把产品定位、目标用户、核心场景、MVP 范围和非目标确认下来。
phases.summary: 用户已确认产品蓝图，并补充确认公开样本蒸馏与表情包/短语音真人感增强范围。
phases.notes: 人格、MVP 场景、用户范围、微信路线、公开样本路线和多模态真人感范围均已确认。
phases.acceptance_hint: 蓝图可以指导静态原型和后续技术规划。

phases.title: Web static prototype confirmation
phases.goal: 在正式编码前，用可查看的静态原型确认聊天体验、管理后台和主要页面结构。
phases.summary: Web 静态原型已由用户确认。
phases.notes: 原型确认后已进入架构规划。本轮已做静态文件检查；浏览器截图验证因工具入口不可用而未完成，但用户在应用内浏览器打开后确认。
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户应能看懂页面、入口、主要流程和信息摆放。

phases.title: Architecture and module-boundary planning
phases.goal: 把确认后的产品和原型翻译成稳定、可迭代的技术结构。
phases.summary: Architecture route confirmed by the user.
phases.notes: MVP route: modular monolith, background worker, and one database.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户应能理解每个模块为什么存在，以及它如何支撑产品稳定上线。

phases.title: Master task board generation
phases.goal: 把项目拆成可追踪的小步骤，并生成用户可读和机器可读的任务状态。
phases.summary: Master task board confirmed by the user.
phases.notes: Project moved to Build Round 1 scoping.
phases.acceptance_hint: The user should be able to see total steps, completed steps, and each step output.

phases.title: Build-round scoping
phases.goal: 在每轮开发前明确本轮做什么、不做什么、完成后用户能验证什么。
phases.notes: User confirmed local companion simulator and admin foundation as Round 1.
phases.acceptance_hint: The user can confirm the first implementation slice.

phases.title: Development progress orchestration
phases.goal: 按已确认的任务板推进开发，并用产品语言持续报告进展。
phases.summary: Local Build Round 1 development is complete and ready for owner smoke test.
phases.notes: Local simulator, admin, storage, safety, memory, multimodal, source status, media fallback, run status, and local WeChat entry mock are implemented. Real credentialed WeChat mapping remains deferred.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户能看到每个开发步骤完成了什么产物。

phases.title: User test intervention guidance
phases.goal: 在可运行版本完成后，引导用户测试核心流程。
phases.summary: Owner smoke test is complete for Build Round 1 local MVP.
phases.notes: Owner observed chat, status, and WeChat Entry flows. One display-language issue was found and fixed.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户能按清单验证真实聊天流程。

phases.title: User-level test documentation
phases.goal: 生成非技术用户也能执行的测试说明。
phases.summary: UAT scripts and acceptance checklist are complete; owner accepted Build Round 1.
phases.notes: Owner explicitly confirmed first round passed.
phases.acceptance_hint: 测试用例应包含目标、前置条件、步骤、预期结果和失败反馈方式。

phases.title: Debug collaboration
phases.goal: 当内测发现问题时，用结构化反馈转成下一步修复行动。
phases.summary: Debug feedback template and no-active-issue ledger are complete.
phases.notes: No active repair tasks block Build Round 1 acceptance.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户不需要懂技术，也能清楚报告问题。

phases.title: Delivery and handoff
phases.goal: 整理交付内容、已知问题和下一轮建议。
phases.summary: Build Round 1 delivery and handoff are complete.
phases.notes: User chose Build Round 2 personality quality, then selected `刀子嘴豆腐心` as the style.
phases.acceptance_hint: 交付摘要应清楚说明源码、文档、架构、核心流程和下一步。

phases.title: Build Round 2 personality quality
phases.goal: 把智能体升级成更明显的 `刀子嘴豆腐心` 损友人格，同时保持安全边界和多轮变化。
phases.summary: Scenario-aware reply planning is implemented and accepted by the owner.
phases.notes: Build Round 2 is accepted. This round improved local text behavior only; real WeChat, stickers, and voice remain deferred.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户在本地聊天模拟里跑烟测，判断嘴欠损友感是否通过。

phases.title: Build Round 3 WeCom live credential route
phases.goal: 从本地 mock 过渡到真实企业微信凭证路线的本地骨架，支持配置自检和回调预检。
phases.summary: WeCom live credential-route skeleton is implemented and ready for owner smoke test.
phases.notes: This round does not finish encrypted echostr decryption or real outbound network sending.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户能在本地页面看懂真实接入准备状态和仍然延期的边界。

phases.title: Auto lightweight memory polish
phases.goal: 把用户记忆从手动添加改成由智能体在聊天中自动沉淀，同时避免写入敏感信息、高风险内容和一次性情绪。
phases.summary: Automatic lightweight memory is implemented and accepted by the owner.
phases.notes: This round removes manual memory add from the owner-facing UI. Memory inference stays conservative, deduped, and safety-aware. Owner accepted the result.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户在本地聊天模拟里验证记忆是否会自动添加、不会重复刷屏、不会保存敏感内容。

phases.title: Expression logic polish
phases.goal: 修复回复像模板拼接、逻辑跳跃的问题，让普通聊天、AI 反馈和重复主题各自使用合适表达。
phases.summary: Expression logic is polished and ready for owner smoke test.
phases.notes: This round adds meta-feedback handling and stops generic messages from receiving unrelated repeated-theme suffixes.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户在聊天模拟里验证回复是否更顺、更符合当前句子。

phases.title: External multi-model router
phases.goal: 把外部大模型 API 作为可切换主脑接入设计清楚，同时保留本地安全、记忆、多模态意图和失败兜底。
phases.summary: Multi-model router skeleton is implemented and ready for owner smoke test.
phases.notes: The app remains runnable without real API keys. Real paid credentials remain an owner setup step.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户能在运行状态页看到外部主脑状态，并确认无 Key 时仍回到本地回复。

phases.title: GitHub open-source radar
phases.goal: 梳理可参考的 GitHub 开源项目，明确哪些适合借鉴架构、哪些适合后续试接、哪些存在许可证或合规风险。
phases.notes: This research does not change the current implementation route; it informs future Dify provider, WeCom adapter hardening, memory distillation, voice, and sticker rounds.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户可以用该文档判断下一轮是否优先接 Dify、继续企微通道，还是进入语音/表情包路线。

steps.title: Explore project context
steps.goal: 确认当前目录中是否已有产品材料或代码，避免重复假设。
output: 当前目录无已有产品代码或文档；Git 尚无提交记录。
steps.notes: 按新项目启动。
steps.acceptance_hint: 工作区情况已明确。

steps.title: Create intake artifact
steps.goal: 形成项目启动说明和初始状态。
steps.notes: 项目类型为 multi-platform。
steps.acceptance_hint: 启动说明包含项目类型、成熟度和风险。

steps.title: Choose AI personality
steps.goal: 确定陪聊智能体给人的第一感受。
output: B + D: 嘴欠但靠谱的深夜损友
steps.notes: 人格同时包含毒舌损友和深夜陪伴。
steps.acceptance_hint: 人格方向清楚且可写入 prompt。

steps.title: Choose MVP anchor scenario
steps.goal: 避免第一版覆盖过宽，先找一个最能体现产品气质的主场景。
output: 生活压力、emo、睡前陪伴优先
steps.notes: 其他吐槽类型兼容，但不作为第一主轴。
steps.acceptance_hint: MVP 主场景已明确。

steps.title: Choose initial user scope
steps.goal: 明确第一版是自用、内测还是公开产品。
output: 你本人 + 少数朋友内测
steps.notes: 需要白名单、基础用户隔离和轻量管理后台。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户规模边界已明确。

steps.title: Choose WeChat route
steps.goal: 在体验、稳定性和合规风险之间选择第一版接入方式。
output: 企业微信/微信客服式入口
steps.notes: 不采用个人微信号自动化作为正式 MVP 路线。
steps.acceptance_hint: 接入路线已明确，可进入原型和架构。

steps.title: Consolidate product blueprint
steps.goal: 将已确认的选择整理成一份可执行产品蓝图。
steps.notes: 蓝图已被用户确认。
steps.acceptance_hint: 产品定义、目标用户、核心场景、MVP 范围和非目标都已写明。

steps.title: Write confirmed design spec
steps.goal: 保存一份可供后续原型、架构和任务拆分使用的确认版规格。
steps.notes: 已完成完整性和矛盾检查。
steps.acceptance_hint: 规格无未完成标记和明显矛盾。

steps.title: Confirm public sample distillation route
steps.goal: 降低用户手动整理私人聊天样本的负担，改用公开来源和合成样本提炼真人聊天行为。
steps.notes: 用户确认使用公开样本，表情包大文件等到关闭 VPN 后再下载。
steps.acceptance_hint: 公开来源、许可边界、下载策略和样本结构已写明。

steps.title: Define sticker and voice realism scope
steps.goal: 把表情包、短语音和真人感行为从口头想法变成可设计、可测试的产品范围。
steps.notes: MVP 先做表情包意图和短语音脚本，真实素材下载、版权和语音合成接入留到架构阶段确认。
steps.acceptance_hint: 真人感行为规则能指导原型页面和后续多模态架构。

steps.title: Confirm prototype review mode
steps.goal: 确认用户是否希望用浏览器可视化方式查看原型。
output: 用户明确要求进入 Web 静态原型阶段。
steps.notes: 用户已确认进入可视化原型阶段。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户确认是否要打开本地浏览器原型。

steps.title: Create screen map and screen specs
steps.goal: 列出原型需要包含的页面和每页信息重点。
steps.notes: 页面清单包括聊天体验、表情包与语音、用户与记忆、样本蒸馏、安全与运行。
steps.acceptance_hint: 页面清单能覆盖 MVP 主流程。

steps.title: Build web static prototype
steps.goal: 让用户能实际查看页面结构、主流程和信息层级。
steps.notes: 静态原型不需要真实后端。已做文件存在、交互选择器和响应式规则的静态检查；浏览器截图验证工具本轮不可用。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户能打开原型并判断页面和流程是否正确。

steps.title: Confirm static prototype
steps.goal: 在正式编码前确认页面、主流程和信息摆放。
output: 用户在应用内浏览器查看后回复“确认”。
steps.notes: 确认后才进入架构阶段。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户明确同意原型可以进入正式实现规划。

steps.title: Create architecture overview
steps.goal: 把确认后的产品和原型翻译成稳定、可迭代的整体系统结构。
steps.notes: 架构将微信、AI、多模态、记忆、安全、样本蒸馏和后台拆成清楚模块。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户能理解系统主要部分如何协作。

steps.title: Define module boundaries
steps.goal: 明确各模块负责什么、不负责什么，降低后续开发混乱和返工。
steps.notes: 模块包括 WeChat Adapter、Message Inbox、Safety Guard、Memory、Orchestrator、Multimodal、Media、Distillation、Admin 和 Observability。
steps.acceptance_hint: 每个模块边界都能对应到产品稳定性或后续迭代速度。

steps.title: Choose implementation strategy
steps.goal: 在速度、稳定性、成本和未来扩展之间选择 MVP 技术路线。
steps.notes: User confirmed the modular monolith MVP route.
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户确认推荐路线后即可生成主任务板。

steps.title: Generate master task board
steps.goal: Split the full project into trackable steps.
steps.notes: Master board, progress board, and artifact registry created.
steps.acceptance_hint: The user can see total steps, completed steps, and outputs.

steps.title: Confirm master task board
steps.goal: Confirm the project split before implementation tracking starts.
output: User confirmed master task board in chat.
steps.notes: Confirmed by user.
steps.acceptance_hint: Project can move to Build Round 1 scoping.

steps.title: Scope build round 1
steps.goal: Define what build round 1 includes, excludes, and makes testable.
steps.notes: Confirmed by user.
steps.acceptance_hint: Round 1 scope confirmed.

steps.title: Project scaffold
steps.goal: Create the runnable app foundation.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Local app can start.

steps.title: Database schema
steps.goal: Create data structures for users, settings, memory, message metadata, and audit events.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Schema or migrations can be verified.

steps.title: Admin console shell
steps.goal: Build the admin page shell from the confirmed prototype.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Admin pages open and switch.

steps.title: Users and whitelist
steps.goal: Manage inner-test user access.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: User states can be created and updated.

steps.title: Conversation simulator
steps.goal: Test chat behavior without WeChat credentials.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Local simulated chat works.

steps.title: Safety Guard
steps.goal: Detect high-risk content and disable jokes, stickers, and playful voice.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: High-risk tests switch to safety mode.

steps.title: Memory Service
steps.goal: Store limited preferences and support disabling or clearing.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Memory can save, read, and clear values.

steps.title: Orchestrator and personality
steps.goal: Generate the late-night friend response plan.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Low-risk scenarios generate suitable response plans.

steps.title: Multimodal decision layer
steps.goal: Choose text, sticker intent, short voice script, or safety response.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Prototype scenarios produce different response modes.

steps.title: Distillation source status
steps.goal: Expose public source, license, and download status.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Source status appears in admin.

steps.title: Media asset layer stub
steps.goal: Create a boundary for future sticker and voice assets.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Media fallback works.

steps.title: WeChat adapter prototype
steps.goal: Wrap WeChat customer-service style receive/send and media capability.
steps.notes: Implemented as a local-only adapter contract. It normalizes a WeChat-style inbound text event, maps a mock external user to an inner-test user, runs the companion core, and builds an outbound envelope. Real credentialed WeChat mapping remains deferred until current docs and credentials are available.
steps.acceptance_hint: Adapter can receive/send or simulate receive/send in test.

steps.title: Observability and audit
steps.goal: Make message failures, safety events, and costs visible.
steps.notes: Implemented in Build Round 1.
steps.acceptance_hint: Error status can be tracked.

steps.title: End-to-end MVP integration
steps.goal: Connect core modules into a runnable inner-test MVP.
steps.notes: Runnable local MVP is available at http://127.0.0.1:8765; real WeChat remains deferred.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can run the main chat flow.

steps.title: Prepare test notice
steps.goal: Tell the user what to test and what not to test yet.
steps.notes: Owner test notice created for the local app.
steps.acceptance_hint: The user knows what to test now and what is deferred.

steps.title: Owner smoke test
steps.goal: Let the owner verify core flows.
steps.notes: Owner provided screenshots showing Sample Status, Run Status, and WeChat Entry are reachable. Status-page display labels were localized after the feedback.
steps.acceptance_hint: Owner verifies normal rant, sleepy voice intent, safety mode, memory, WeChat entry mock, sample status, and run status.
steps.progress_summary: Done. Smoke test passed after one display-language fix.

steps.title: Write UAT scripts
steps.goal: Create nontechnical user test scripts.
steps.notes: Covers local console, normal rant, sleepy voice intent, safety mode, memory, WeChat Entry mock, and source/run status.
steps.acceptance_hint: Scripts can be shared with inner-test friends.

steps.title: Acceptance checklist
steps.goal: Define first-version pass/fail criteria.
steps.notes: Owner explicitly confirmed Build Round 1 passed.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can confirm whether MVP meets the bar.

steps.title: Bug feedback template
steps.goal: Make inner-test issue reports actionable.
steps.notes: Template includes chat reply, page operation, WeChat Entry mock, safety issue, severity, and evidence fields.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can report issues clearly.

steps.title: Debug next actions
steps.goal: Turn found issues into repair actions.
steps.notes: No active repair queue remains after Build Round 1 acceptance.
steps.acceptance_hint: Each issue has a next action.

steps.title: Delivery summary
steps.goal: Summarize delivered work and known issues.
steps.notes: Delivery explains source, docs, core flows, deferred items, verification, and next-round choices.
steps.acceptance_hint: Delivery content is clear.

steps.title: Handoff notes
steps.goal: Record next-iteration guidance and maintenance notes.
steps.notes: Handoff notes are complete; user chose Build Round 2 personality quality.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can decide the next direction.

steps.title: Confirm Round 2 personality scope
steps.goal: Choose the second build-round focus and exact personality route.
output: User chose personality quality, then selected `刀子嘴豆腐心`.
steps.notes: Real WeChat credentials and real media were left deferred.
steps.acceptance_hint: Round 2 scope is clear.

steps.title: Write personality spec and plan
steps.goal: Save behavior design and a test-first implementation plan.
steps.notes: Spec defines three-beat replies, no personal attacks, scenario variation, and safety override.
steps.acceptance_hint: Spec and plan can guide implementation without chat history.

steps.title: Upgrade personality reply engine
steps.goal: Add scenario-aware `刀子嘴豆腐心` replies with multi-turn variation.
steps.notes: Reply plans now include persona style, scenario id, and scenario turn count.
steps.acceptance_hint: Automated tests cover variation, self-blame boundary, safety override, and work-rant reply shape.

steps.title: Owner personality smoke test
steps.goal: Let the owner judge whether the upgraded personality feels right.
steps.notes: Owner accepted Build Round 2 personality quality.
steps.acceptance_hint: Owner can mark Round 2 accepted or request wording polish.

steps.title: Confirm Round 3 real credential route
steps.goal: Choose real WeCom credential path as the third build-round focus.
output: User chose A and confirmed the real credential-route skeleton scope.
steps.notes: Real secrets stay outside chat and source code.
steps.acceptance_hint: Round 3 scope is clear.

steps.title: Write WeCom live spec and plan
steps.goal: Save real credential-route design and implementation plan.
steps.notes: Spec explicitly excludes personal WeChat automation and source-code secrets.
steps.acceptance_hint: Spec and plan can guide implementation without chat history.

steps.title: Build WeCom live adapter skeleton
steps.goal: Add config self-check, signature validation, callback preflight, dev inbound, and text payload builder.
steps.notes: Real encrypted callback verification waits for WXBizMsgCrypt-compatible support.
steps.acceptance_hint: Automated tests cover live config, signature, callback boundary, dev inbound, and send payload.

steps.title: Add WeCom live admin self-check
steps.goal: Show live credential readiness in the WeChat Entry page.
steps.notes: UI shows missing configuration, callback URL, crypto state, and next action.
steps.acceptance_hint: Owner can inspect the live route without reading logs.

steps.title: Owner WeCom route smoke test
steps.goal: Let the owner verify the live credential-route skeleton and its boundaries.
steps.notes: Owner should inspect the WeChat Entry self-check and status API.
steps.acceptance_hint: Owner can mark Round 3 accepted or request wording/route polish.

steps.title: Confirm auto memory scope
steps.goal: 确认用户记忆应由智能体自动添加，而不是要求用户手动维护。
output: User chose option A: automatic lightweight memory.
steps.notes: Scope is limited to stable preferences and repeated themes; secrets and high-risk content are excluded.
steps.acceptance_hint: 自动记忆方向已明确。

steps.title: Write spec and plan
steps.goal: 把自动记忆的保存范围、排除范围、UI 改动和验证方式写清楚。
steps.notes: Uses test-first implementation with conservative rules.
steps.acceptance_hint: 设计和计划能解释为什么不让用户手动添加记忆。

steps.title: Build auto memory engine
steps.goal: 在聊天响应中自动推断安全的轻量记忆，并把记忆页改为自动记忆管理。
steps.notes: The memory API remains for backend/admin use, but the owner-facing UI no longer asks users to add memory manually.
steps.acceptance_hint: 聊天后自动出现偏好记忆，重复表达不会重复保存。

steps.title: Owner auto memory smoke test
steps.goal: 让用户用本地页面验证自动记忆是否符合预期。
steps.notes: Owner accepted automatic add, dedupe, sensitive skip, and Chinese-only memory UI copy.
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户按烟测脚本通过后，本轮自动记忆打磨即可验收。

steps.title: Capture owner feedback
steps.goal: 记录截图中 AI 回复逻辑跳跃、模板拼接感太强的问题。
output: Owner screenshot feedback: AI replies lack logic.
steps.notes: The observed issue came from generic replies receiving repeated-theme suffixes and AI-quality feedback being treated as ordinary chat.
steps.acceptance_hint: 问题已明确到回复表达逻辑层。

steps.title: Add regression tests
steps.goal: 用测试锁住普通诗意句和 AI 质量反馈的正确回复形态。
steps.notes: Tests first failed against the old generic repeated-theme behavior, then passed after the reply engine fix.
steps.acceptance_hint: 测试能捕捉截图中的模板拼接问题。

steps.title: Polish reply expression logic
steps.goal: 新增 AI 反馈场景，清理泛聊天的重复剧情后缀，并把重复提示改成分场景表达。
steps.notes: Generic messages now stay literal and light; meta-feedback replies directly accept and repair; work/identity/self-blame repeats keep scenario-specific notes.
steps.acceptance_hint: 回复顺序应变成听懂当前句子、站队或承认问题、给下一步。

steps.title: Owner expression smoke test
steps.goal: 让用户在本地聊天模拟中验证表达是否更有逻辑。
steps.notes: Owner should test poetic generic messages, AI-quality feedback, and work rant preservation.
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户按烟测脚本通过后，本轮表达逻辑优化即可验收。

steps.title: Confirm provider route
steps.goal: 确认外部主脑使用多模型路由，而不是单一供应商。
steps.notes: Route includes OpenAI preferred provider, DeepSeek fallback/cost option, Gemini optional provider, and local fallback.
steps.acceptance_hint: 外部 API 接入路线已明确。

steps.title: Write multi-model router design
steps.goal: 定义 provider router、隐私边界、失败兜底、后台状态和首轮实现范围。
steps.notes: Design references current official docs for OpenAI Responses API, DeepSeek Chat Completion, and Gemini generateContent.
steps.acceptance_hint: 设计说明能指导下一轮实现并避免泄露密钥。

steps.title: Owner design review
steps.goal: 让用户确认多模型路由设计后再开始代码实现。
steps.notes: Owner confirmed implementation after reviewing the multi-model router route.
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户已确认可以实现。

steps.title: Implement router core
steps.goal: 新增 OpenAI、DeepSeek、Gemini 的统一外部主脑路由和本地兜底。
steps.notes: Router defaults to local mode, redacts secrets, supports fake transports for tests, and falls back on provider errors.
steps.acceptance_hint: 无 Key 时不联网；配置 provider 后可走外部模型。

steps.title: Wire router into chat flow
steps.goal: 在本地计划后尝试外部模型增强，同时保留安全、本地回复和多模态意图。
steps.notes: Safety mode never calls the external provider; provider metadata is saved into the plan and audit event.
steps.acceptance_hint: 聊天仍能本地运行，外部失败时不会中断。

steps.title: Add external brain status UI
steps.goal: 让非技术用户在运行状态页看懂外部主脑是否启用、当前模式和兜底原因。
steps.notes: The status API and UI expose provider configuration state without secret values.
steps.acceptance_hint: 运行状态页能看到外部主脑面板。

steps.title: Owner multi-model router smoke test
steps.goal: 由用户确认默认本地兜底、状态页展示和聊天流程仍可用。
steps.notes: Real paid API credentials are not required for this smoke test.
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户在本地页面确认外部主脑状态和聊天可用。

steps.title: Create GitHub open-source radar
steps.goal: 对微信/企微机器人、外部主脑、语音、表情包和记忆相关开源项目做产品化取舍。
steps.notes: The radar recommends learning from LangBot and CowAgent, adding Dify later as an optional provider, keeping personal-WeChat automation research-only, and treating voice/sticker assets as license-gated tracks.
steps.acceptance_hint: 文档给出每个项目的采用建议、风险和与当前代码的落点。

decisions.title: AI personality
decisions.context: 智能体需要有稳定人格，避免像普通客服或问答机器人。

options.label: 毒舌损友型 + 深夜陪伴型

decisions.recommendation_reason: 这个组合最贴近用户想要的吐槽陪伴感。
decisions.notes: 最终人格名暂定为深夜损友。

decisions.title: MVP anchor scenario
decisions.context: 产品可以聊很多内容，但第一版需要一个最能体现价值的主场景。

options.label: 生活压力 + emo + 睡前陪伴

decisions.recommendation_reason: 最适合深夜损友人格，也能自然覆盖其他吐槽场景。

decisions.title: Initial user scope
decisions.context: 用户范围决定是否需要白名单、管理后台和更严格的隔离。

options.label: 一开始公开给很多用户

decisions.recommendation_reason: 少数朋友内测能验证真实使用感，同时避免过早做复杂运营系统。
decisions.notes: 第一版需要内测白名单。

decisions.title: WeChat integration route
decisions.context: 产品要接入微信环境，但不同路线在体验、稳定性和风险上差异很大。

options.label: 企业微信/微信客服式入口
小程序 + 客服/聊天页

decisions.recommendation_reason: MVP 优先稳定和可内测，不选择高封号风险的个人微信自动化。
decisions.notes: 架构阶段需要继续核对当前官方能力。

decisions.title: Prototype review mode
decisions.context: 下一阶段是静态原型确认，用户可以选择是否用浏览器查看视觉原型。

options.label: 使用浏览器可视化原型

decisions.user_decision: 进入 Web 静态原型，把聊天、表情包、语音、管理后台和样本蒸馏状态都做成可看的页面流
decisions.recommendation_reason: 聊天体验和管理后台更适合看原型确认。
decisions.notes: 用户已确认使用可视化静态原型。

decisions.title: Public sample distillation route
decisions.context: 用户认为手动整理私人聊天样本太麻烦，希望使用公开样本和 GitHub 蒸馏项目作为行为来源。

options.label: 用户手动提供私人样本
公开来源 + 合成样本

decisions.user_decision: 确认抓取公开样本，表情包文件等关闭 VPN 后再下载
decisions.recommendation_reason: 能减少用户整理成本，同时降低私人聊天隐私风险。
decisions.notes: 本阶段只抓元数据、来源清单和轻量合成样本，不下载大体积素材。

decisions.title: Multimodal realism scope
decisions.context: 用户希望 AI 能发表情包、语音等，更像真人朋友。

options.label: 立即下载并接入所有表情包和语音素材
先做表情包意图和短语音脚本，素材后接入

decisions.user_decision: 先节省 VPN 流量，等关闭 VPN 后再下载表情包文件
decisions.recommendation_reason: 先把行为逻辑做清楚，避免大文件流量、版权和 API 细节拖慢产品设计。
decisions.notes: 架构阶段继续确认微信媒体能力、素材版权和语音合成路线。

decisions.title: MVP architecture route
decisions.context: 原型已确认，需要选择第一版实现方式，影响开发速度、调试难度和未来扩展。

options.label: 模块化单体 + 后台任务 + 一个数据库

decisions.recommendation_reason: 对你和少数朋友内测来说，这条路线最快、最容易调试，也能保持后续拆分空间。
decisions.notes: User confirmed modular monolith with background worker and one database; project moved to master board confirmation.

decisions.title: Build Round 1 scope
decisions.context: The master task board is confirmed, so the first implementation slice must be confirmed before coding starts.

options.label: Local simulator and admin foundation first

decisions.recommendation_reason: It lets the owner verify the core companion experience before platform credentials, media rights, and voice-provider choices slow the build down.
decisions.notes: User confirmed local simulator and admin foundation; implementation completed and moved to owner smoke test.

decisions.title: Build Round 2 personality quality route
decisions.context: Build Round 1 was accepted and the owner needed to choose the next focus.

options.label: 真实微信接入凭证路线
真实表情包/语音素材路线

decisions.user_decision: C, then A: personality quality with `刀子嘴豆腐心`.
decisions.recommendation_reason: This improves the friend-like feel before wider testing and keeps platform/media risks deferred.
decisions.notes: Round 2 implementation focuses on local text behavior, scenario variation, and safety boundaries.

decisions.title: Build Round 2 acceptance
decisions.context: Owner completed the personality feel-test after the `刀子嘴豆腐心` upgrade.
decisions.recommendation_reason: Owner confirmed the personality quality round meets the feel-test bar.
decisions.notes: Project now waits for Build Round 3 focus choice.

decisions.title: Build Round 3 WeCom live credential route
decisions.context: Build Round 2 was accepted and the owner chose the next focus.

options.label: 真实企业微信凭证路线
真实表情包/语音素材路线

decisions.user_decision: A, then confirmed: real WeCom credential-route skeleton.
decisions.recommendation_reason: The local personality quality is accepted, so the next highest-value step is moving toward a real WeChat-side entry without exposing secrets.
decisions.notes: Round 3 builds the route skeleton; real encrypted callback verification and public HTTPS remain next steps.

decisions.title: Automatic lightweight memory mode
decisions.context: 用户指出记忆应该由智能体自动添加，而不是要求用户手动维护，这会影响陪聊产品是否像真人朋友。
decisions.recommendation_reason: 自动沉淀稳定偏好和反复主题更像真人朋友，也减少用户维护成本；敏感和高风险内容必须跳过。
decisions.notes: 本轮采用规则型保守推断，后续可再升级为模型抽取加用户可撤销审核。

decisions.title: Auto memory polish acceptance
decisions.context: Owner completed the automatic lightweight memory smoke test.
decisions.recommendation_reason: Owner confirmed the automatic memory behavior meets the acceptance bar.
decisions.notes: Project is ready for the next build-round focus choice.

decisions.title: Expression logic polish route
decisions.context: Owner reported that AI replies lacked logic and showed a screenshot where generic replies received unrelated repeated-theme suffixes.
decisions.user_decision: Optimize AI expression logic after screenshot feedback.
decisions.recommendation_reason: The issue is a local reply-planning bug, so a focused expression logic polish is faster and lower risk than redesigning the whole personality.
decisions.notes: This keeps the accepted personality and automatic memory behavior while improving sentence logic.

decisions.title: External model API route
decisions.context: Owner wants the companion to become smarter by connecting external model or agent APIs.
decisions.recommendation_reason: Multi-model routing improves quality while keeping fallback choices for cost, availability, and future provider changes.
decisions.notes: Implementation should keep local fallback active and never expose API keys in UI or logs.

decisions.title: Multi-model router implementation confirmation
decisions.context: Owner reviewed the multi-model router route and asked to implement it.
decisions.recommendation_reason: The design keeps paid credentials optional and preserves local fallback, so implementation can proceed safely.
decisions.notes: The first implementation uses fake transports in tests and exposes only redacted provider status.
